author: MambaTrades
content:
Tariff Pump

Market  Analysis
Indices are showing massive relative strength due to tariff agreement between the US and China with NQ up 3.77% and ES up 2.91%. It is at the point where I don't know how much further up we can go. NQ i would like for us to sell off, bounce at 20713.75 and set a divergence for longs. I am open to shorts if we reject 20943 and set a bearish divergence.

ES Volume: 394k - insane volume due to the news

Any News?
US and China news

Watchlist
NQ long setups 
-over 20943 PT 21096
-bounce @ 20713.75
-sell off, then divergence

ES longs setups
-Bounce @5831.25
-trend above OP
-sell off then divergence

open to shorts
 if NQ rejects 20943 with divergence
@everyone

author: MambaTrades
content:
Futures Premarket Gameplan
Market  Analysis
Indices are showing relative strength due to good tech earnings frrom AMZN and APPL. I want to see NQ trend above OP to target 26867, 26291, 26328

ES Volume: 180k - good volume, want 150k min

Any News?
No news but good tech earnings after the bell yesterday

Watchlist
NQ buy setup above OP and 15m gap. Target 26867, 26291, 26328
NQ sell setup below OP Target 26144, 26136

ES buy setup above OP and 15m gap. Target 6929, 2932, 6953
ES setup below OP to target London lows and Asia low. 
@everyone

content: i am open to shorts if we get strong sellers at open since there could be profit taking on tech stocks @here Targets would be asia low and london lows
